'''Iunist''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual who trained as a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] many hundreds of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Iunist eventually specialized as a [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]],<ref name="Gamer" /> a branch of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that focused on physical training, prowess in battle, and [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|training]].<ref name="Rulebook">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]''</ref> The Jedi Guardian once encountered [[Gusepp]], an infamous [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] tyrant, and engaged him in [[Skirmish between Iunist and Gusepp|battle]], eventually [[Cho mok/Legends|severing]] the [[Reptile/Legends|reptile's]] [[Limb/Legends|hand]] midway along the forearm. This encounter became legendary, and Gusepp's [[Mummy/Legends|mummified]] [[Gusepp's Hand|hand]] became a valuable artifact; stored in a hermetically sealed [[Glass/Legends|glass]] dome, the relic was worth 60,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the Galactic Empire, during which time it came into the possession of the [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Gallo Memm]].<ref name="Gamer" />

==Behind the scenes==
Iunist was created by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] adventure "[[Topside Infiltration]]" published in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]<ref name="Gamer" /> on [[December 21]], [[2001]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20011210.html|text=Yuuzhan Vong Invade ''Gamer'' #8}}</ref>
